# 1.0.2 / 2017-09-09

  * Fix handling of various invalid URLs
  * Improve performance by skipping regex when no unencoded characters
  * perf: improve byte parsing performance

# 1.0.1 / 2016-06-09

  * Fix encoding of `%` character in certain sequences
  * perf: small performance improvement
  * docs: add more examples to README

# 1.0.0 / 2016-01-17

  * Initial release
  * Extracted from Express.js URL encoding utilities
  * Includes full test coverage and documentation
